resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete this series? The novels within will NOT be deleted from your library.
Are you sure you want to delete this series? The manga within will NOT be deleted from your library.
No chapters available for this series.
Add additional repos to %s. This should be a URL that ends with \"index.min.json\".
Only works if the current chapter/episode + the next one are already downloaded.
Skip entries with unseen episode(s)/unread chapter(s)
Show unseen/unread count on Updates icon
Hide the top chrome and bottom navigation while scrolling, but keep categories visible.
Use horizontal swipes on the library to switch between categories instead of sections (anime/manga/novels).
Update progress when marked as read/watched
Clear episode/chapter cache on app launch
Are you sure? Completed episodes and chapters and progress of non-library entries will be lost
Also apply to all manga in my library
Also apply to all novels in my library
Reset all chapters for this manga
Couldn\'t download due to low storage space
Warning: large bulk downloads may lead to sources becoming slower and/or blocking Aniyomi. Tap to learn more.
Force app to recheck downloaded chapters and episodes
Internal player, gestures, decoders, subtitles, layout
At what point to mark the episode as seen
Preserve watch position on seen episodes
Only appears if the video has chapters
Remember and switch to the last used brightness
Remember and switch to the last used volume
Hide player controls when opening the player
Show system status bar with controls
Display custom action buttons in the player
Configure portrait and landscape control placement
Configure the player layout in portrait mode
Configure the player layout in landscape mode
AniSkip requires the anime to be tracked with MAL or Anilist to work
Disable AniSkip if video already contains chapters
Enable the use of PiP mode
Show episode toasts when switching episodes in PiP mode
Automatically switch to PiP mode on exiting the player
Replaces the "Skip 10 seconds" option with "Previous episode"
Always ask video quality on episode click
Swipe left or right to rewind or fast-forward
When enabled, seeking will not focus on keyframes, leading to slower but precise seeking
When a tap gesture is set to "Custom", it can be bound through input.conf. The key codes are 0x10001 for left, 0x10002 for center, and 0x10003 for right.
When a media control is set to "Custom", it can be bound through input.conf. The key codes are 0x10004 for previous, 0x10005 for play/pause, and 0x10006 for next.
Apply one profile to all decoder options at once
May fix black screens on some video codecs, can also improve performance at the cost of quality
Real-time anime upscaling shaders. Device-dependent and meant for anime content only.
Smooths choppy playback. Optional and device-dependent — may increase battery usage.
Subtitle language(s) to be selected by default on a video with multiple subtitles, Two- or three-letter languages codes work. Multiple values can be delimited by a comma.
Pick the subtitle whose language label matches the preferred locale exactly before looser matches
Whitelist for subtitles. If a whitelist is defined, the first subtitle that contains a whitelisted word will be used. Multiple values can be delimited by a comma.
Blacklist for subtitles. If a blacklist is defined, all subtitles that contains a blacklisted word will be filtered out. Multiple values can be delimited by a comma.
Preferred languages, pitch correction, audio channels
Audio language(s) to be selected by default on a video with multiple audio streams, Two- or three-letter languages codes work. Multiple values can be delimited by a comma.
Prevents the audio from becoming high-pitched at faster speeds and low-pitched at slower speeds
Execute lua code with custom buttons
You have no custom buttons. Tap the plus button to create a custom button.
Do you wish to delete the button "%s"?
Edit and create new scripts and script options
Directory contains no items. Tap the plus button to add a new file.
You have unsaved changes. Do you still wish to go back?
Do you wish to delete the file \"%s\"?
Edit MPV configuration file for further player settings
Edit MPV input file for keyboard mapping configuration
Some filters may not work on your current video driver
Prevents the audio from becoming high-pitched at faster speeds and low-pitched at slower speeds
Secondary subtitles will have no ASS/SSA Styling.
Preserve reading position on read chapters
New episodes predicted to be released in around %1$s, checking around every %2$s.
This anime is either completed, or there is no predicted release date.
Unable to migrate episode to season, select season to continue
Unable to migrate season to episode
Warning: Backing up settings will store your track passwords as well, do not share this backup file!
Use custom settings for this source only
Theme controls are available only in Theme mode
Background controls are available only in Background mode
Apply a fixed first-line indent to each paragraph in reader mode
Force all text to be displayed in bold font weight
Force all text to be displayed in italic font style
Apply a drop shadow to the text for better contrast
Draw dark gradients on the side edges for a book feel
Preserve source text alignment in native reader
Do not force the global text alignment in native mode; keep source alignment where supported
Use volume buttons to scroll pages
Enable horizontal swipe gestures for navigation
Display content in pages instead of continuous scroll
Display chapter titles in Page mode
Open chapter in WebView by default. Disable to use native renderer.
Preserve common HTML styles in the native renderer with automatic WebView fallback for unsupported content.
Unavailable while Page mode is enabled.
Unavailable while the chapter is currently opened in WebView.
Unavailable while Bionic reading is enabled.
Detailed source-alignment and chapter-cache policies stay in global settings; this quick dialog is reserved for frequently changed in-reader controls.
Global settings keep long-lived defaults like source alignment and chapter cache; the in-reader quick dialog focuses on adjustments you change while reading.
Silently prefetch next chapter after reaching 50% progress
Store opened chapters in a compressed temporary cache for faster reopen (auto-limited size)
Disable chapter cache entry/size limits (may use a lot of storage)
Delete all cached read chapters (does not affect downloads)
Prevent screen from turning off while reading
Master switch for Time-to-end and Word counter
For readability, prefer images without decorative frames.
Custom background is unavailable. Switched to built-in background.
Soft warm paper texture for daytime reading.
Classic worn page style with gentle contrast.
Warm parchment with soft folds and a vintage tone.
Light wrinkled paper look with subtle depth.
Deep dark texture for low-light reading sessions.
Dark wooden texture with cinematic atmosphere.
Applies only to Native-Rich. 50% = current look
Use a deep edge darkening in dark theme for smoother OLED scrolling
Select text for copying without translation
This setting is global only and ignores source overrides.
Selected-text translation is unavailable for this WebView chapter.
Selection is too long to translate.
Please wait before retrying this translation.
Prepare spoken reading, background playback, and follow-along behavior for novel chapters.
Auto uses exact highlighting when supported and estimated timing otherwise.
Shows the current word or phrase while playback is active.
Keeps page, native scroll, or WebView position aligned with speech progress.
Uses translated chapter text when it is available, otherwise falls back to the original text.
This engine does not expose a stable voice list, so language is selected directly.
No voices available for the selected language
Automatically start translation when source language is English
Start next chapter translation in background after 30% reading progress
Cloud-hosted Ollama models through the native Ollama API.
Chunk translation settings used by the AI button in reader.
Do not restore/save chapter translation cache
Keep partial translations when some chunks fail
Choose the source language and the language you want to translate into.
Optional extra instructions appended to the system prompt
Shows AI controls in novel reader (AI menu and quick button above seekbar)
No cached translation for this chapter.
Pick the engine first. The rest of the panel adapts to the selected provider.
Balanced default setup with the simplest flow.
Private bridge mode for unlocked local or protected routes.
Wide model catalog and flexible routing through one endpoint.
Strong long-form reasoning with its own hosted models.
Fast European-hosted models with a leaner setup.
Ollama-hosted cloud models through the native /api/chat endpoint.
Choose the model that will translate this chapter. Faster models respond sooner, larger models usually keep tone better.
Style presets tune narration, dialogue, and phrasing without changing your provider.
%s: protected private bridge rules are used and auto-mode runs without user modifiers.
API key, cache, and manual stream control
These toggles control when translation starts and whether the next chapter is prepared in advance.
Base URL and API key are only needed for the active provider. Refresh the list after changing them.
Use connection checks and cache tools when requests fail, models disappear, or results look stale.
Start translating automatically when the source text is already in English.
Prepare the next chapter in advance so chapter switching feels faster.
Keeps the private bridge in its Python-like compatibility mode.
Only providers with custom endpoints need a base URL.
This key is stored locally and used only for the active provider.
This setting helps the translator work more reliably. It is recommended to keep it enabled.
Keep chapter results locally to avoid unnecessary repeat requests.
Batch size and concurrency control how aggressively the chapter is translated.
Fill Base URL, API key and Model
Fill Base URL, API key and Model
When thinking mode is enabled, DeepSeek ignores temperature, top_p, presence_penalty, and frequency_penalty.
For DeepSeek, Temperature should stay in 1.3-1.5 and TopP in 0.9-0.95. TopK is not used.
Prompt mode changes how strict the system prompt is before your style and modifiers are applied.
%s bridge is locked. Unlock it first.
The text will be added to the system prompt as an additional instruction.
Faithful handling of explicit adult content
Game-like terminology, stats, and system messages
Long chapters with dense lore and terminology
Stable style, strong cohesion, and minimal accidental noise
Everyday scenes, internal monologues, and drama
More elegant wording and vivid phrasing without overdoing it
Dialogue-heavy chapters, banter, humor, and flirting
Speech feels more natural and emotionally alive
Rawer wording, stronger intensity, and no sanitization
Experimental mode for the boldest chapters
Peak creative freedom without overcomplicating settings
Long chapters with dense lore and terminology
Stable style, strong cohesion, and minimal accidental noise
Everyday scenes, internal monologues, and drama
More literary phrasing and lively wording without overdoing it
Conversation-heavy chapters, sparring, humor, and flirting
Characters sound more natural and emotionally expressive
Maximum sensuality, expressiveness, and a living rhythm
Experimental mode for the boldest chapters
Stable creative translation for everyday use
Lively text with a controlled amount of variation
Brighter and more natural delivery of lines and tone
A bolder and more variable style
Peak creative freedom without making settings complicated
At least one section must stay enabled
Move History to the More tab
Move Updates to the More tab
Move Titles to the More tab
Move Browse to the More tab
No translated chapters found in cache
No translated chapters available to download
Choose an action for the downloaded translation
Custom JavaScript may not be supported by all EPUB readers
Only search pinned manga sources in global search
Only search pinned anime sources in global search
Hide manga entries already in library
Hide anime entries already in library
Hide novel entries already in library
Auto uses Modern and falls back to Legacy in Battery Saver
Set start screen to Manga Tab
Manga in excluded categories will not be updated even if they are also in included categories.
Anime in excluded categories will not be updated even if they are also in included categories.
Novels in excluded categories will not be updated even if they are also in included categories.
This extension is not from the official list.
This extension is not from the official list.
Always use external downloader for anime
Skip downloading duplicate read novel chapters
Only works on entries in library and if the current episode plus the next one are already downloaded
Open track menu on adding to library
Use these services to track novel progress and reading lists.
Map reading statuses to custom NovelUpdates lists.
Choose which NovelUpdates list each status uses.
What information to include in the backup file
Used by anime: %1$s, used by manga: %2$s
Delete history for manga that are not saved in your library
Delete history for anime that are not saved in your library
Delete history for novels that are not saved in your library
Clear cached storage used by novel plugins
Are you sure you wish to delete \"%s\"?
Are you sure you want to delete the selected episodes?
Also apply to all anime in my library
This will remove the watch date of this episode. Are you sure?
Reset all episodes for this anime
Delete sync data from Google Drive
Sync data deleted from Google Drive
No sync data found in Google Drive
Error purging sync data from Google Drive, try signing in again
Failed to sign in to Google Drive: %s
Not signed in to Google Drive
Error uploading sync data to Google Drive
Error deleting Google Drive lock file
Deleting sync data will remove all your sync data from Google Drive. Are you sure you want to continue?
Sync your library across devices using Google Drive
Are you sure you want to sign out from Google Drive?
Copied video quality link to clipboard
Mark duplicate seen episode as seen
Update seasons with episodes on refresh
Update seasons with episodes on library update
Hide hidden categories from categories and storage screen
Compress images before downloading or loading in reader
Use data saver in the downloader
Higher values mean that a higher percentage of the image quality is saved, but it also means the file size is larger, 80 percent is a good median between file size and image quality
The Jpeg file size is considerably smaller then Webp is(meaning more data is saved), but it makes the images lose more quality as well.\nCurrently compresses to Jpeg
The Jpeg file size is considerably smaller then Webp is(meaning more data is saved), but it makes the images lose more quality as well.\nCurrently compresses to Webp
Bandwidth Hero (requires a Bandwidth Hero Proxy server)
Put Bandwidth Hero Proxy server url here
Will only download concurrently from self-hosted or unmetered sources
Higher values can speed up page loading, but some sources work better with smaller values.
Set to 0 to disable the speed limit.
Add some anime to your library to see them here
Need another dose? Welcome back for more.
The season finale is over, and so was your break
Welcome back, your watchlist filed a missing person report
At this point we should charge rent
Monday survives better with one episode
Tuesday is just Monday with subtitles
Thursday mood: almost weekend, definitely anime
Friday unlocked. Queue the good stuff.
Life finds meaning in black and white 🖤🤍
A wall of text won\'t stop a true cultivator! 🧘‍♂️
Reading right to left, living backwards 📖
B-baka! It\'s not like I wanted you back... 😤
You\'ll only watch titles with me, right? 🔪💕
The Dark Lord\'s Eye resonates! The time has come! 👁️🔥
Welcome home, Master! Tea or a new chapter? ☕🧹
The app almost grew cobwebs! Thanks for saving it 🕸️
Is your real-life training arc over? Show off those new skills! ⚔️
Do you remember where you left off, or are we in an amnesia arc? 🤕
They say there\'s something outside called \"grass.\" Want to touch it? 🌱
Need a coffee IV, or can you pour your own? ☕🩸
Your virtual 2D room is ready. Come on in! 🚪
A month without breaks. A true hikki professional! 🏆
100 days?! You\'ve reached Zen and merged with the 2D world 🧘‍♂️
Any shonen hero would envy your dedication! 💪
Error 404: Reality not found. Only anime left 🤖
You won\'t watch everything you added, just admit it 🤫
Your \"Plan to Watch\" list has its own gravity now 🌌
Run with toast in your mouth, or you\'ll be late for the show! 🍞🏃‍♀️
The best alarm is a new episode release ⏰
Another day without being reborn as a slime. Guess we live this life 💧
Siesta time! Perfect for a few cozy slice-of-life episodes 🍰
Afternoon tea time with the Light Music Club 🎸
Day boss \"Responsibility\" defeated. Loot XP and watch anime! 🎮
Max cozy level reached. Launching \"chill\" protocol 🐾
Dinner tastes better when someone is yelling \"TATAKAE!\" 🍽️
Ninja mode active: watching so no one at home hears 🥷
Sun\'s down, we\'re up. Welcome, child of the night 🦇
Your Sharingan is active from lack of sleep. Go to bed! 👁️🩸
Late night is perfect for drama. Cry into your pillow! 😭
Weekend means not taking off pajamas until Monday 👘
Prep the snacks, close the blinds — the marathon begins! 🏃‍♂️💨
No regrets about time spent. It was spent on art! 🎨
Surviving weekdays is a hardcore quest in itself 🛡️
Pretend it\'s a training montage. Weekend is coming! 🎬
Your luck today is SSR rank! Enjoy the show ✨
Don the plot armor and dive into a new title! 🛡️
BANKAI! Wait... just launching the app! 🗡️
Dedicate your hearts to quality content! Shinzo wo sasageyo! ✊❤️
Look both ways, or Truck-san will send you to a fantasy world! 🚚
Magical girl transformation... or just turning on the player 🪄
Get in the robot, Shinji... or just watch anime 🤖
Ah, I see you are a person of culture as well 🧐🍷
Careful, infinite scrolling might lead to tunnel syndrome! 📱
Bless the translators and typesetters for our happy lives 🙏
Don\'t forget to blink while staring at this epic double spread! 📖
Black and white pages are brighter than any reality 🖤🤍
Is your finger ready for an infinite scroll marathon? 🏃‍♂️
Cliffhanger pain? Hang in there, we\'re with you 🫂
Refreshing for a new chapter? We feel you 🔄
This art style is breathtaking! Enjoy the read ✨
Reading raws because you can\'t wait? Respect 🕵️‍♂️
Fresh scanlations, still smelling of pixels! Dive in 🗞️
This light novel title is longer than my life... 📜
Diving into the text! Imagination at 100%! 🧠✨
\"Just one chapter\" — and you\'ve inhaled the whole volume 📚
Reading MTL? May the Dao of Understanding save you! 🤖
Warning: wall of text ahead. You can handle this! 🧱
That one color illustration per volume is worth living for 🖼️
Your reading cultivation has reached the Soul Nascent stage 🧘
Reborn as a villainess again? Break that engagement! 👑
Murim calls! Unsheathe your phone, young master ⚔️
MC hiding power for 100 chapters. Let\'s see when they snap 🤫
MC went back 10 years, and you just went back to the app ⏪
Another OP MC isekai? Give me two! 🛡️
Ready to yell at the screen? MC is being dense again 🤦‍♂️
Revenge is sweet, especially stretched over 200 chapters 😈
The 3D world can wait. We have a plot to follow! 🌍🚫
Welcome to the absolute comfort zone 🛋️
Time to refill your serotonin with some top-tier content 💊
DND mode: On. Let the world wait 🤫
If reading paid a salary, you\'d be a millionaire 💰
Opening the app instantly warms the soul ☀️
No deadlines here. Just you, the screen, and heroes 📅❌
Your escapism is officially sponsored by this app 🎟️
A thousand worlds at your fingertips. Where to? 🌌
Kettle on, blanket ready? Let\'s go! 🍵
Cat is sleeping, tea is hot, phone is charged. Perfect 🐈
\"Just one more chapter.\" The biggest lie ever 🤥
Hear that? It\'s your \"Read Later\" list crying 💧
Your bookmarks are about to burst from all the quality! 📑
If only I could wipe my memory to read this again... 🧠✨
Starting a new title while five others are unfinished? Judged... but understood 👀
Hoarding chapters for a binge? Hope the wait was worth it! 🐹
Clean your screen, or you\'ll miss the small details! 🧽
Got enough charge for this marathon? 🔋
Lower your brightness in the dark. Save your eyes! 👁️
Blessings of stable Wi-Fi and fast downloads upon you! 📶
Swipe down to update. Did the author drop an extra? ⬇️
Dark mode: a friend of youth and sponsor of sleepless nights 🌙
Feel that vibe? New chapters are knocking on your library 📳
Library sorted, updates checked. Awaiting your orders! 📋
Your library is up to date!\nTap refresh to check for new episodes.
Shows locally saved novel chapters, not an active queue.
Queue shows active tasks. Saved chapters are shown below.
Open the update sheet with mock release data
Add sources and find something interesting
Source for anime posters, ratings, and status
Display anime ratings and types from Shikimori.one
Replace anime covers with high-quality images from Shikimori.one
Display original title from description in parentheses
Translate the title and description into the current app language for selected source languages
Only translate when the source language is one of: %s
Show soft animated color glows on Aurora screens
Applies recommended low-motion reader settings once when enabled
Style for the recent cards on the Home screen: %s
Style for the action button on the Home screen: %s
Style for the action button on Aurora title cards: %s
Reset app and title card fonts to system default
Load a custom TTF/OTF font for the app and title cards
Exclusive rewards unlocked by your deeds
Enable special effects for covers and UI
Royal nickname styling with a bright gold crown accent.
Corrupted rune nickname effect with a synthetic glitch pulse.
Cipher-style nickname effect with bracketed secret energy.
Animated neon frame with an electric sweep around the avatar.
Holographic avatar frame with a soft scanline shimmer.
Prismatic avatar frame with a shifting spectrum glow.
Orbit badge that wraps the Home Hub nickname.
Crown badge for a more regal Home Hub header.
Sharp-edged badge with an arcade-like profile vibe.
Animated sakura petals drifting across the Aurora background.
Neon orbital rings and particles that replace the default ambient bloom.
Complete rare or secret achievements to unlock exclusive rewards!
There are no achievements in this category yet
10 episodes watched - just getting warmed up!
500 episodes! Aren't your eyes tired yet?
A thousand episodes. You are officially a legend.
500 chapters! You're definitely not the artist?
20 different genres. Something for every taste!
90 days! That's an entire anime season!
Read or watch 1000 chapters or episodes
1000 chapters and 1000 episodes. Yin and yang.
Read for more than 2 hours in one session
Finish a title in the Tragedy genre
10+ completed Shounen titles - I'll become the king!
Finish a title in the Super Power genre
Finish a title in the Military genre (Attack on Titan reference)
Everything is Going According to Plan
Finish a title in the Psychological genre (Code Geass reference)
Exactly 1 anime and 1 manga in your library (One Punch Man reference)
JoJo's Bizarre Adventure in your library (JoJo reference)
Drag greeting, nickname, avatar, and streak positions
Drag elements to reposition them inside the Home header.
This will restore the default positions for header elements.
Shows Google Translate controls in novel reader (Google menu and quick button above seekbar)
Switch to %1$s? Current %2$s translation will be lost
Rate limited. Tap Resume to retry.
Feed sources not configured. Tap + to add a source that supports Latest.
This source will be removed from your feed.
Hide feed entries already in library
This saved search will be permanently deleted.
Temporarily unlocks all Treasury rewards for visual validation
